answer:
Medically necessary immunotherapy is covered under the plan subject to prior authorization and meeting Premera's medical policy requirements.

| Benefit | Service | In-Network | Out-of-Network | Limitations |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Cellular Immunotherapy And Gene Therapy | Cellular Immunotherapy And Gene Therapy | Deductible, then 20% coinsurance | Deductible, then 40% coinsurance | You may have additional costs for other services such as x-rays, labs, prescription drugs, and hospital facility charges. See those covered services for details. |

| Topic | Coverage Information |
| :--- | :--- |
| Cellular Immunotherapy And Gene Therapy | Benefits are provided for medically necessary immunotherapy and gene therapy, such as CAR-T immunotherapy. Services must meet Premera’s medical policy. You can access our medical policies by contacting customer service or going to premera.com. Services also require prior authorization. See Prior Authorization. |
source: Premera Employees Health Plan – Standard PPO Retiree Plan
